<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get album image"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/library/album/{id}.png"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the album's cover art image. Requires authentication.

  as={"h2"}
